Interface ISPOT5Xform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a SPOT5 1A transform.

[Guid("4A303832-7EE4-491C-8434-84521E353589")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISPOT5Xform : IGeodataXform
